name: skill-mcp
description: Self-hostable Agent Skills registry over MCP - Cloudflare Workers + Workers AI + Qdrant Cloud

QDRANT_URL.description: Your Qdrant Cloud cluster URL (e.g. https://xxx.aws.cloud.qdrant.io:6333)

QDRANT_API_KEY.description: Qdrant Cloud API key (from cluster > API Keys)

ai.description: Workers AI binding for embedding generation (@cf/baai/bge-small-en-v1.5)

durable_objects.description: SQLite-backed Durable Object for MCP server state
